certificate.intro: Certificate production is not part of this Module 2 dry run.

clinicalHub.title: Clinical Support Deferred
clinicalHub.warning: Clinical practice is source-stated (1 recommended clinical hours) and not online credit.

scenarios.title: In-person clinical practice deferred
scenarios.body: Hands-on performance/evaluation is deferred and not validated online.

modules.source_status_flag: Generated from approved Module 2 PDF source map.
learning_objectives: Explain the purpose of a long-term care facility
Recognize the role of the Nurse Assistant in maintaining patient/resident rights, as stated in federal and state regulation
Compare California Code of Regulations Title 22, Division 5, Chapter 3, 72527, with Title 42 Code of Federal Regulations 483.10 regarding patient/resident rights
Explain the Nurse Assistant role in preventing negligent acts and violation of patient/resident rights
Describe the Nurse Assistant role in reporting patient/resident rights violations
Describe the role of an ombudsman
Identify examples of patient/resident rights, which support a patient's/resident's need for security, belonging and self-esteem
